cards.title: Test the happy path
cards.body: Does it work when you give it correct data? If you create an item with a valid name, does it come back with an ID?

cards.title: Test the sad path
cards.body: Does it fail gracefully with bad data? If you create an item without a name, does it return a 400 error instead of crashing?

cards.title: Test edge cases
cards.body: What about unusual inputs? An empty string? An extremely long name? A number where a string is expected?

cards.title: Keep tests independent
cards.body: Each test should work on its own. It should not depend on another test running first or leaving data behind.
